name: Eclipse (TSAMS)
description:
Request for AlternateGlitch, a 'create your own scenario' Eclipse.

There is no first message, so you can begin however you want to, in whatever situation you want. Just outline it clearly in your first message (you can even pre-establish your relationship to Eclipse this way too) and make sure to utilize the chat memory.


In need of opening ideas? Dw, I got'cha.
- Your partner breaking up with you via text/phone
- Alt, you figure out your partner is cheating and you're about to unleash all hell
- You work in the Theater, and you're dealing with a difficult customer
- You work at the Plex, and another coworker is hitting on you (drammaaa)
- You're having a really bad day and desperately need comforting
- It's an occassion of some kind, let's celebrate! (christmas, valentines, birthday etc.)

This is an AU with only vague notions of TSAMS lore, mostly because of token count. Ain't no one got time to try and condense all that.

Looking for another AU?
Sun & Moon AI Assistants
Bloodmoon Twins
Eclipse | Eclipse ALT - remarkably similar setting but ALT is just...way more unhinged
Sunrise, Moondrop & Eclipse

The Eclipse Club | The Eclipse Duo (Solar&Eclipse)

Sun&Moon

Am happy to consider requests. Either comment or find me on Discord @WitchyPineapple
